name: Create PO via API, convert to Bill, verify stock addition

steps.name: Click locator('div[role="option"], [role="menuitem"], li, .chakra-menu__menuitem, button').filter({ hasText: /System Admin/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').first().locator('button').filter({ hasText: /^(Advance|Submit|Approve|Save|Confirm)$/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Click locator('div[role="option"], [role="menuitem"], li, .chakra-menu__menuitem, button').filter({ hasText: /System Admin/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').first().locator('button').filter({ hasText: /^(Advance|Submit|Approve|Save|Confirm)$/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()

Wait for selector locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()

Click locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()

Clear locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()

Fill "Manenderas" locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()
Click locator('.chakra-popover__content, [role="listbox"], .chakra-menu__list, div[data-placement]').filter({ visible: true }).last().getByText('Manenderas', { exact: true }).first()

Wait for selector locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()

Click locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()

Clear locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()

Fill "PO/2026/04/15/000197" locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()
Click locator('.chakra-popover__content, [role="listbox"], .chakra-menu__list, div[data-placement]').filter({ visible: true }).last().getByText('PO/2026/04/15/000197', { exact: true }).first()
Click locator('.chakra-form-control, [role="group"], .flex-col, div').filter({ has: getByText(/^Invoice Date\s*\*?$/i) }).filter({ has: locator('button') }).last().locator('button').first()
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Accounts Payable selector' })
Wait for selector getByRole('tab', { name: /Received Purchase Order/i })
Query count locator('table tbody tr').filter({ has: locator('.chakra-checkbox') })
Click locator('table tbody tr').filter({ has: locator('.chakra-checkbox') }).first().locator('.chakra-checkbox__control').last()
Wait for selector locator('table tbody tr').filter({ has: locator('.chakra-checkbox') }).first().locator('input[type="number"], .chakra-numberinput__field').last()
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ has: locator('.chakra-checkbox') }).first().locator('input[type="number"], .chakra-numberinput__field').last()
Clear locator('table tbody tr').filter({ has: locator('.chakra-checkbox') }).first().locator('input[type="number"], .chakra-numberinput__field').last()
Fill "3" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ has: locator('.chakra-checkbox') }).first().locator('input[type="number"], .chakra-numberinput__field').last()
Press "Enter" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ has: locator('.chakra-checkbox') }).first().locator('input[type="number"], .chakra-numberinput__field').last()
Click locator('div[role="option"], [role="menuitem"], li, .chakra-menu__menuitem, button').filter({ hasText: /System Admin/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').first().locator('button').filter({ hasText: /^(Advance|Submit|Approve|Save|Confirm)$/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Click locator('div[role="option"], [role="menuitem"], li, .chakra-menu__menuitem, button').filter({ hasText: /System Admin/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').first().locator('button').filter({ hasText: /^(Advance|Submit|Approve|Save|Confirm)$/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Fill "fifoitem4" getByPlaceholder('Search for inventory...').filter({ visible: true }).first()
Click locator('table tbody tr a').filter({ hasText: /(?:^| - )fifoitem4\s*$/i }).first()
